diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I forgot my password and I need to reset it.
[Agent] I can help with account recovery. For security, I'll need to verify that you own the account before making any changes. Could you please provide your UID?
[Caller] Yes, 603245891.
[Agent] Thank you. I see the account. Per our Account Recovery Policy, I need to verify ownership via at least one secure verification method. I'll send a one-time verification code to the email on file ending in @email.com. Can you access that email?
[Caller] Yes, go ahead.
[Agent] Code sent. Please read back the six digits when you receive them.
[Caller] OK, got it. It's 482913.
[Agent] Verified. Before I reset the password, per policy I must advise that a reset will log out all active sessions, including any linked platforms such as PlayStation Network. You'll need to sign in again on each device. Do you understand and want to proceed?
[Caller] Yes, please proceed.
[Agent] Thank you. I've initiated the reset. You'll receive a password reset link at the same email within two minutes. The link expires in 30 minutes. For your security, please choose a password with at least 12 characters including numbers and symbols.
[Caller] Will do. Thank you.
[Agent] Is there anything else I can help with today?
[Caller] No, that's all.
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. Have a good day.
